title: fragaria vesca subsp. monophylla
intro: Fragaria vesca subsp. monophylla, also known as the Alpine Strawberry or Single Leaf Strawberry, is a subspecies of strawberry native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca subsp. monophylla include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
